---
name: "Feature request"
about: Propose a new feature or improvement for the project
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Description

Describe the feature or improvement clearly.

## Goal

What problem does this feature solve?
What is the expected benefit for the project?

## Scope

Which part of the project is concerned?

- [ ] Frontend
- [ ] Backend
- [ ] Database
- [ ] Docker / Infrastructure
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other

## Proposed Tasks

- [ ] Define expected behavior
- [ ] Design the implementation
- [ ] Implement the feature
- [ ] Test locally
- [ ] Verify integration with the rest of the project
- [ ] Update documentation if needed

## Notes

Add any useful details, screenshots, API ideas, mockups, or technical notes here.
